papers.title: From PBS to ePBS: the Microstructure of Block Building
papers.titleZh: 从 PBS 到 ePBS：区块构建的微观结构
papers.abstract: Ethereum's Glamsterdam upgrade introduces enshrined proposer-builder separation (ePBS), replacing relay-centric PBS with direct builder bids to proposers. We study how this shift changes the block-building microstructure through a general imperfect-information two-stage auction with verifiable messages, where an early bid serves as both a price offer and a signal. PBS and ePBS are modeled as restrictions of the same block-building game: PBS fixes stopping and disclosure exogenously, while ePBS lets the proposer choose stopping and disclosure ex post. Latency heterogeneity is captured by asymmetric information updates: fast builders observe disclosed early information before rebidding, while slow builders do not. We combine exact perfect Bayesian equilibrium characterizations in tractable cases with calibrated no-regret learning in finite games. For PBS, we show that separating equilibria preserve the standard first-price-auction payoff benchmark and provide conditions for their existence. For ePBS, we demonstrate a ratchet effect: because the proposer can defer block proposal and use early bid information in the second stage, builders anticipate ex-post extraction and shade or pool early bids, generating allocation inefficiency and revenue-efficiency valleys. We interpret this ratchet distortion as a commitment failure. Under full commitment, the optimal policy collapses to the static Myerson auction and removes the ratchet channel. To realize part of this commitment advantage in a feasible mechanism, we propose a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) sidecar that enforces limited commitment. We formulate the revenue-maximizing TEE mechanism as a bilinear optimization problem. In conservative finite benchmarks, the TEE design increases the proposer revenue relative to the first-price benchmark by approximately \(25\%\).

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 本文研究以太坊从PBS到ePBS升级中的区块构建机制变化。传统PBS依赖中继网络进行公开竞价，而ePBS允许提议者直接接收出价并自主决定何时披露信息，从而引发策略性延迟与信号利用问题。核心问题是：这种灵活性会如何扭曲竞标者的出价行为，进而影响收入与效率？
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者构建了一个两阶段不完全信息拍卖模型，其中提议者可选择立即接受出价或延迟进入第二轮，并选择性披露已收到的签名出价。快速建造者能在第二轮前观察披露信息并调整出价，慢速建造者则不能。该设定捕捉了延迟带来的共识风险（k2<1）与信息优势的不对称更新。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文发现ePBS会产生‘棘轮效应’：建造者预期提议者将利用早期出价诱导更高后续报价，因而主动压低或聚集早期出价，导致分配无效率和收入下降。相比之下，PBS在适当条件下可维持首价拍卖的效率。这揭示了缺乏承诺能力会导致动态激励失衡。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者结合了完美贝叶斯均衡的解析刻画与基于反事实后悔最小化的校准仿真。在简化模型中通过构造分离与聚集均衡来揭示机制，而在更复杂的非独立同分布、异构延迟环境中，使用无后悔学习模拟验证理论发现的稳健性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型聚焦于两阶段动态，且最优TEE机制的计算受限于离散化规模。尽管如此，论文清晰展示了信息设计与承诺在去中心化市场中的核心作用。最值得阅读的是其对‘棘轮效应’的建模洞察、均衡分析方法及对可信执行环境作为有限承诺装置的设计思想。

papers.title: Paradoxes of Game Theoretic Equilibria and Price of Anarchy
papers.titleZh: 博弈论均衡与无效率代价的悖论
papers.abstract: For decades, static solution concepts (Nash, Correlated, and Coarse Correlated Equilibria) and the Price of Anarchy (PoA) have formed the bedrock of algorithmic game theory, with no-regret learning proving fast convergence to such game-theoretic equilibria. We show that reducing multi-agent learning to static equilibrium and black-box regret analysis obscures underlying dynamic disequilibrium and game theoretic bounds. First, interior Nash equilibria lack $C^1$ vector field information, meaning agents cannot distinguish aligned from strictly opposing incentives. Inheriting this geometry, the worst-case pure Nash equilibria dictating robust PoA bounds manifest as topologically unstable strict saddles, and in canonical congestion games, as global repellers supported on almost everywhere strictly dominated strategies. Anchoring efficiency guarantees to these unstable states causes algebraic sensitivity; we prove that accommodating all strictly positive affine costs renders the PoA unbounded. Furthermore, projecting learning trajectories onto the discrete simplex of correlated play systematically accommodates non-rationalizable behavior. Evaluating dynamics via Coarse Correlated Equilibria or proximal refinements fails to preclude strictly dominated strategies. Moreover, optimal $O(1/T)$ swap-regret minimization does not preclude macroscopic turbulence, manifesting as chaotic limit sets even in minimal games. Finally, we examine the non-atomic limit of congestion games. Though considered highly stable with tight sub-linear $Θ(p/\ln p)$ PoA bounds (where $p$ is the polynomial degree), we prove that under discrete-time learning, the unique equilibrium destabilizes into Li-Yorke chaos and global attractors whose time-averaged inefficiency degrades exponentially as $2^p$. These results necessitate re-evaluating worst-case equilibrium frameworks for dynamically grounded metrics.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统算法博弈论依赖纳什均衡和无效率代价（PoA）来评估多智能体系统的效率，认为学习动力学会收敛到近似最优的均衡。然而，该文指出这种静态分析忽略了动态过程的本质，导致理论预测与实际学习轨迹脱节。问题在于：为何基于均衡的效率保证在实践中可能失效？
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 文章研究标准的拥塞博弈与势博弈，其中多个代理通过梯度类学习规则（如复制子动力学、乘法权重更新）调整策略。模型关注连续状态空间中的向量场动态，并考察相关均衡、粗相关均衡及其变体作为长期行为的抽象。关键设定是将学习轨迹投影到离散单纯形上的常规做法。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明，许多被视作高效保证的均衡实际上在动态上不稳定或非理性。例如，决定PoA紧界的纯纳什均衡是严格鞍点，甚至成为全局排斥子；近似最优状态可能使所有代理比其最小最大安全收益更差；即使达到零交换后悔，系统仍可能出现混沌极限集。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者采用连续时间动力系统视角，结合拓扑分析与李雅普诺夫函数方法，揭示均衡点的局部几何结构。通过解析延拓处理边界不动点，并利用战略等价性分析不变性。关键技术包括Chetaev不稳定性定理、中心流形理论及对时间平均行为的测度论分析。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 论文聚焦理论反例而非一般性破坏，其构造虽具典型性但依赖特定参数配置。尽管如此，它深刻挑战了将均衡等同于可实现结果的默认假设。最值得读的是其对‘动态不可达均衡’的系统论证，以及将动力系统理论引入博弈学习分析的新框架。

papers.title: Philosopher and Prophet Inequalities for Divisible Items
papers.titleZh: 可分割物品的哲学家与先知不等式
papers.abstract: We study online welfare maximization with divisible resources. A sequence of $n$ players arrive one by one; upon arrival, each player draws a valuation function over $m$ divisible items from a known distribution, reveals this valuation, and must be allocated an irrevocable fractional bundle subject to unit supply constraints. While online welfare maximization has been extensively studied for indivisible items and combinatorial valuations, much less is known when the resources are divisible and players have multi-dimensional concave valuations. We give approximation algorithms for monotone concave valuations satisfying diminishing returns. Our main result is a $2/3$-approximation to the optimal online policy, also known as the philosopher benchmark. The algorithm is guided by a low-dimensional concave relaxation of the online benchmark and rounds it via a new single-item capped online contention resolution scheme. This Capped-OCRS problem allocates to each realized type no more than its prescribed fractional bundle while preserving a $2/3$-fraction of that bundle in expectation. Its analysis uses a submartingale potential for the remaining side, we show that computing the optimal online policy is #P-hard even for a single divisible item. We also obtain a tight prophet inequality against the offline hindsight optimum. We show that a fixed-price auction with one linear per-unit price for each original divisible item achieves a $1/2$-approximation to the offline/prophet benchmark. The prices are obtained by aggregating Aumann--Shapley supporting prices, a continuous analogue of supporting prices for submodular/XOS set functions, and yield simple item prices rather than copy-dependent prices arising from discretization. The factor $1/2$ for the prophet benchmark is information-theoretically tight even for one item with linear valuations.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 在线福利最大化在不可分物品下已被广泛研究，但现实中许多资源（如带宽、能源）是可分割的。本文关注当物品可分割且玩家估值为多维凹函数时，如何在未知未来到来者的情况下进行不可撤销的分配。核心问题是：相比离散情形，分数分配是否带来更强的算法能力？特别是，在面对最优在线策略（哲学家）和后见最优（先知）两种基准时，能否突破传统1-1/e的障碍？
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型中有m个单位供应的可分割物品和n个依次到达的玩家。每位玩家从已知分布中采样一个单调凹的DR-子模估值函数并揭示该函数，算法需立即分配一个满足容量约束的分数捆绑。目标是最大化期望社会福利。论文对比两个基准：哲学家（最优在线策略）和先知（后见最优）。估值满足递减回报，涵盖预算加总和分离凹函数等常见形式。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文的主要成果是对哲学家基准实现了2/3近似比，超过了不可分情形下的1-1/e信息论上限，表明可分性确实带来了本质优势。此外，针对先知基准，提出了基于Aumann-Shapley价格的固定单价拍卖，实现了紧的1/2近似比。硬度结果表明，即使对单个可分物品，计算最优在线策略也是#P难的，突显了设计高效算法的必要性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 2/3近似算法基于一个低维凹松弛，并通过一种新的‘单物品封顶在线争议解决机制’（Capped-OCRS）进行舍入。该机制利用剩余供给与预期供给之比动态调整分配比例，并借助次鞅势能函数分析其性能。对于1/2先知不等式，则采用连续版本的支持价格——Aumann-Shapley值，通过对松弛解聚合得到全局线性单价，从而简化定价机制。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 尽管结果优美，但2/3算法依赖于特定的缩放函数，目前尚不知是否最优；而1/2因子被证明是信息论紧的。模型假设估值为凹函数，可能限制了对某些非凸偏好的适用性。然而，论文在可分资源分配中建立了新的理论基准，其Capped-OCRS和连续支持价格的技术具有独立价值，特别适合关注在线算法设计与机制简洁性的读者深入研读。

papers.title: Robust Welfare Decentralization under Population Entry
papers.titleZh: 人口进入下的稳健福利分散化
papers.abstract: We ask when an incumbent economy with indivisible goods can accommodate an arbitrary new participant while retaining an efficient allocation supported by anonymous item prices. We call this property universal entry robustness. An economy is universally entry-robust if and only if its aggregate welfare valuation is additive. Although the requirement quantifies over all entrant valuations, it can be tested using one canonical entrant whose value for a bundle equals the loss in maximal incumbent welfare caused by removing that bundle. When the characterization holds, one uniquely determined price vector decentralizes the incumbent optimum and every one-agent extension. The proof is direct and uses only demand optimality and welfare comparisons, making transparent why arbitrary-entry robustness eliminates all bundle interactions in aggregate welfare. We finally relate this argument to the robust-integrality interpretation obtained from the linear-programming characterization of Bikhchandani and Mamer (1997). Individual incumbent valuations may be nonadditive and need not satisfy gross substitutes.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当新参与者加入一个已有市场时，原有资源配置能否继续保持高效并由统一价格支持？本文研究在不可分商品市场中，一个既定经济体能否在任意新代理进入后仍维持竞争均衡的存在性。这触及了市场稳定性的一个根本问题：个体偏好可能高度非线性且互补性强，但系统整体是否仍能通过简单价格机制协调。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型包含一组既有代理和一组不可分商品，每个代理有单调递增的估值函数。定义了一个聚合福利函数表示既存群体从任意商品子集所能获得的最大总效用。新进入者的估值完全任意。关注是否存在一组匿名商品价格，使得无论谁加入，原有效率分配及其扩展都能被该价格系统支持。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 核心发现是：经济体具备普遍进入稳健性的充要条件是其聚合福利函数为加性。这意味着尽管个体估值可含复杂互补关系，只要整体社会价值可分解为独立的商品边际贡献，就能用固定价格应对任意新增需求。此外，只需测试一种特定‘福利损失型’进入者即可判定全局稳健性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 证明不依赖线性规划对偶，而是基于直接的效用比较与需求最优性分析。关键技巧是构造一个‘规范福利损失进入者’，其估值等于剥夺某商品束导致的原群体最大福利损失。由此揭示：若此极端情形可被价格支持，则所有情形均可；且价格必须唯一对应各商品的社会边际价值。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 结果要求聚合福利严格加性，现实中可能过强。但它清晰分离了个体内非加性与系统级可定价性之间的界限。最值得读的是其经济直觉：通过一个内生构造的压力测试，将复杂的跨人群稳健性归约为单一函数的代数性质，为理解价格机制的边界提供了新视角。

papers.title: Decoupling Corruption and Horizon in Robust Contextual Pricing
papers.titleZh: 解耦腐败与时间范围的鲁棒情境定价
papers.abstract: We study robust repeated contextual pricing, where valuations depends linearly on the features. At each round $t\in[T]$, a seller observes a context, posts a price, and receives only a possibly corrupted binary sale feedback. The seller knows an upper bound $C$ on the number of corrupted rounds. We design an algorithm with regret $\mathcal O(Cd+d^2\log T)$, where $d$ is the context dimension. This is the first guarantee for robust contextual pricing that separates the dependence on the corruption budget $C$ from the horizon $T$, closing the problem left open by Gupta, Guruganesh, Paes Leme, and Schneider (2025).

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统情境定价算法依赖无噪声反馈，一旦买家行为被少数恶意或异常响应干扰，性能会急剧下降。现有鲁棒方法的遗憾界将腐败预算C与时间T耦合，导致C较大时退化严重。本文追问：能否设计出将C和T影响解耦的算法，使腐败仅带来线性代价而不放大时间维度的影响？这触及鲁棒学习中如何分离异常值与序列长度的根本挑战。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定一个卖方在T轮中逐轮观察d维上下文特征，基于线性估值假设（估值=参数与上下文内积）定价，并仅收到二元销售反馈。至多C轮的反馈可被敌手任意篡改。卖方面对完全未知的真实参数和上下文序列，需在不识别腐败轮次的前提下最小化累计遗憾。核心难点在于反馈不可靠且上下文动态变化，使得经典可行集收缩方法失效。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出首个实现腐败与时间范围解耦的算法，达到O(Cd + d²log T)的遗憾界。该结果首次将腐败项Cd与时间项d²log T以加性形式分离，优于此前O(Cd log log T)的乘性耦合界。特别当C远大于log T时，性能显著提升。这表明即使存在持续干扰，学习仍可在高维情境下保持对时间的近对数增长速率。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 算法结合密度更新与证据集机制：维护一个参数空间上的密度分布以稳健追踪真实参数，并构建2C+1个互斥证据集存储近似准确的价格观测。探索阶段同时进行密度调整与证据收集；承诺阶段利用多数证据集的置信区间下界取第(C+1)大值，确保价格既低于真实估值又接近最优。关键创新在于通过乐观并发更新应对缺失接近反馈。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 遗憾界中的d²因子源于从标准反馈模拟接近反馈的开销，可能非紧。算法依赖已知腐败预算C，且每轮计算复杂度较高。尽管如此，其融合密度法与容错聚合的思想为鲁棒决策提供了新范式。最值得细读的是证据集构造与双势能分析，以及如何将非情境下的鲁棒搜索技术迁移到定价场景。

papers.title: Active Noise Floor Estimation for Reliability-Optimal POMDPs: A Value-of-Noise-Information Approach
papers.titleZh: 面向可靠性最优POMDP的主动噪声底估计：一种噪声信息价值方法
papers.abstract: Finite Reliability Representations (FRR) certify when a cell-constant policy is sufficient for reliable decision-making in a partially observed system with a known physical noise floor. In practice, however, sensing and execution noise can be latent and context-dependent. This paper develops a certificate-aware active disambiguation framework for an unknown physical noise parameter theta = (sigma_y, sigma_u), with the sensor-only case obtained by fixing sigma_u. We define the Value of Noise Information (VoNI) as the expected excess FRR certificate gap caused by using a reliability cover calibrated to the current estimate rather than to the realized noise parameter. We bound VoNI using action-value model mismatch and FRR radius inflation, showing that noise estimation has low decision value in sub-crossover regimes where the FRR certificate is insensitive to theta, but becomes valuable when posterior uncertainty can invalidate the current cover. A bi-level decision maker uses a posterior over theta, obtained from innovation statistics, execution residuals, or another online estimator, and triggers diagnostic probing only when uncertainty threatens the FRR certificate. We also interpret VoNI as a tractable, certificate-aware approximation to a high-level finite POMDP for latent sensing-execution regime disambiguation. Under stationary, identifiable, and persistently exciting regimes, we establish posterior consistency and convergence of the induced policy loss to the FRR approximation floor. Closed-loop UGV simulations with EKF-based innovation residuals show earlier detection of abrupt sensing-noise jumps, lower drift-tracking error, and substantially fewer probing actions than posterior-entropy exploration over 50 Monte Carlo trials.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 在部分观测系统中，传统可靠性方法假设物理噪声水平已知，但在实际环境中，传感器和执行器的噪声会随光照、地形等因素动态变化，导致预设的可靠性保障失效。现有方法多专注于噪声参数估计本身，却忽略了何时获取更精确噪声信息才真正影响决策可靠性。本文提出应从决策价值角度判断是否值得进行诊断性探测。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究在未知物理噪声参数下如何维持POMDP策略的可靠性证书。系统维护对噪声参数的后验分布，并基于此评估当前策略的可靠性风险。输入为观测残差或执行残差，输出为是否触发诊断动作。通过仿真无人地面车闭环系统，比较所提方法与基于后验熵的探索策略在检测突变、跟踪漂移及探测量上的表现。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 核心贡献是提出‘噪声信息价值’（VoNI），量化因噪声参数误估而导致的额外可靠性损失期望。VoNI仅在后验不确定性可能破坏当前可靠性覆盖时才触发探测，从而显著减少不必要的探测量。实验表明其比后验熵方法更早检测噪声跳变，跟踪漂移误差更低，且探测量大幅减少，验证了证书驱动探测的有效性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: VoNI通过两个可计算项界定：动作值模型失配与FRR半径膨胀因子。前者衡量不同噪声假设下的最优动作值差异，后者反映因噪声估计偏差导致的覆盖分辨率不足。该界限使VoNI能在不求解完整贝叶斯自适应POMDP的情况下，近似高阶决策过程的单步收益，实现高效、证书感知的主动辨识。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 方法依赖于后验校准与持续激励条件，在数据无法区分感测与执行噪声或轨迹缺乏激励时可能失效。数值实验基于简化动力学与代理证书模型。尽管如此，论文的价值在于提出了将噪声估计与高层决策耦合的新范式，最值得阅读的是其问题设定、VoNI机制设计及其作为高阶POMDP近似的解释视角。

contentTags: 部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程
tags: 部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程

papers.title: From World Action Models to Embodied Brains: A Roadmap for Open-World Physical Intelligence
papers.titleZh: 从世界动作模型到具身大脑：开放世界物理智能路线图
papers.abstract: Artificial general intelligence ultimately requires agents that can reason and act in the physical world. Action models, vision-language-action policies, and world models have advanced this goal, while World Action Models (WAMs) are particularly promising because they connect candidate interventions with predicted consequences. However, progress remains fragmented: models use incompatible action spaces and prediction targets, datasets and tasks follow different conventions, and runtime systems expose limited interfaces for reuse and evaluation. We review the evolution toward WAMs and organize these limitations into three coupled gaps: model roles and representations, objectives and standardization, and system composition. Building on this analysis, we propose a co-evolution roadmap for physical intelligence centered on the \emph{embodied brain}, a long-term model target for integrating multimodal context, comparing candidate interventions, and issuing state-transition or capability requests rather than direct actuator commands. WAMs provide promising prototypes for its predictive functions, while a physical harness grounds model outputs through tools, controllers, verification, and trace logging. Shared contracts align heterogeneous models, data, tasks, and embodiments, and closed-loop post-training converts verified interaction into reusable experience. Together, these components define a modular physical-intelligence stack for adaptive and self-improving embodied agents.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前具身智能系统面临模型、数据与执行系统之间接口不统一的问题，导致能力难以积累。尽管世界动作模型（WAM）能预测干预后果，但其输出常绑定特定机器人控制器，限制了泛化性。本文指出三大耦合障碍：模型角色不清、评估标准不一、系统生态割裂，阻碍了物理智能的规模化发展。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文提出一个分层的物理智能系统架构，核心是‘具身大脑’作为通用推理模型，输出意图而非具体动作。通过物理‘线束’（harness）将意图转化为具体执行，并记录包含上下文、决策与结果的可回放轨迹。实验设定强调闭环后训练，利用标准化的实体卡、任务卡和轨迹卡来统一异构数据与任务的语义。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 主要贡献是一套促进累积进步的共进化路线图，包括定义WAM预测契约、提出具身大脑模型目标、建立经验与评估契约。结果并非单一性能提升，而是提供了一种使不同组件独立测试、兼容并进化的框架，推动从孤立模型向可持续自改进智能体的转变。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法通过分离通用物理推理与局部执行，使模型无需重训即可适配新硬件。具身大脑基于上下文比较干预方案，输出状态转移或能力请求；线束负责接地、验证与执行。关键技术在于明确各模块接口契约，确保预测、意图、工具调用和轨迹记录具备可比性和可追溯性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 论文尚未实证整个栈的实际性能，其主张依赖于未来接口的广泛采纳。评测仍处于构想阶段，缺乏跨平台验证。尽管如此，该框架极具阅读价值，尤其适合关注长期智能体演化、系统级可扩展性与开放式物理交互的研究者，提供了清晰的问题诊断与发展路径。

papers.title: Towards Predictive, Aligned, and Scalable Robot Learning
papers.titleZh: 迈向可预测、对齐且可扩展的机器人学习
papers.abstract: Learning, at its core, extends beyond memorization to the ability to reason and solve novel problems by navigating a space of possibilities. We introduce Lumo-2, a latent world-action model that generates actions by reasoning over world dynamics in latent space. The learned latent world dynamics capture physically grounded visual transitions, naturally encoding future possibilities and providing a unified substrate for cross-modal alignment. This formulation enables predictive reasoning akin to world modelling while remaining lightweight and focused on physical dynamics relevant to control. Central to our approach is the hypothesis that action generation quality is governed by the geometry of the latent space. We observe that standard reconstruction-based action tokenization objectives induce representations biased toward low-level signal fidelity, leading to misalignment between reconstruction quality and downstream control performance. To address this limitation, we propose a multi-stage modality pre-alignment strategy in which action representations are progressively aligned with latent world dynamics, vision, and language. This process enforces cross-modal consistency, promotes abstraction, and induces a structured latent space for predictive reasoning. We provide a systematic empirical study of latent world modelling and modality alignment, analyzing their roles in scaling laws and out-of-distribution generalization. Results show that Lumo-2 consistently outperforms strong vision-language-action (VLA) and world-action model (WAM) baselines, with gains on challenging real-world tasks requiring temporal reasoning, physical understanding, or high control complexity, including long-horizon and dexterous manipulation. These findings suggest that structured multimodal alignment and predictive reasoning are fundamental principles for advancing embodied intelligence.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有机器人学习模型在动作生成上常依赖低级信号重建，导致动作表征与视觉、语言模态不对齐，影响泛化能力。尤其在长视野、高精度操作中，仅靠当前观测难以处理状态歧义。本文针对动作模态缺乏语义对齐的问题，探索如何通过潜空间建模提升预测性与一致性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型接收语言指令、视觉观测与本体感知输入，输出机器人动作序列。其核心是在潜空间中建模世界动态，并以此引导动作生成。训练采用真实机器人与人类第一视角视频混合数据，在多种复杂操作任务上测试，涵盖时间推理、物理理解和灵巧控制，评估指标包括任务成功率与跨模态对齐质量。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出Lumo-2模型，通过三阶段渐进式对齐训练，使动作表征与世界动态、视觉、语言统一于共享潜空间。实验证明其在多类挑战性任务上优于强基线，尤其在需长期记忆与物理推理的场景中表现突出，验证了预测性潜推理对提升泛化与控制精度的有效性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法关键在于分阶段对齐：先联合训练动作与潜世界动态，建立初步关联；再引入语义增强，使动作码具备可解释性；最后进行大规模共训练，显式利用未来状态预测指导动作生成。该机制缓解了多模态异构带来的训练不稳定性，提升了动作生成的语义一致性与物理合理性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型依赖高质量多源数据，且潜空间有效性依赖于预训练视觉编码器。虽在真实任务中表现优异，但对极端分布外场景的鲁棒性未充分验证。最值得阅读的是其三阶段对齐框架的设计逻辑与消融分析，为多模态具身学习提供了可复用的方法论参考。

papers.title: Learning to Navigate Efficiently with Only 0.58M Trainable Parameters
papers.titleZh: 仅用0.58M可训练参数高效学习导航
papers.abstract: Recent progress in visual navigation has largely been driven by scale: end-to-end policies with hundreds of millions of parameters trained on billions of frames or large-scale simulated data. We ask how much of this scale a single task family actually requires, and what structure can substitute for it. We propose a decomposed navigation model in which operations with known closed-form structure, such as projective geometry, occupancy, and coordinate transforms, are computed analytically and serve as interfaces between three small learned modules: an egress predictor that grounds the episode goal as a local subgoal in the current view, a navigation predictor that estimates a goal-conditioned posterior over where trajectories travel, and an endpoint-pinned residual diffusion generator that samples trajectory shapes from this posterior. The system trains only 0.58M out of a total of 22.7M parameters, on 44k frames in under one GPU-hour, yet approaches the performance of state-of-the-art models on navigation tasks across 6060 point-goal episodes and 60 environments, while having 233x fewer trainable parameters, the lowest collision rate among all evaluated methods, and 50 Hz inference speed. The decomposition further transfers to no-goal exploration by retraining only the 123k-parameter egress head, and its failure modes under sensor corruption are transparent and analytically correctable.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前视觉导航依赖大规模端到端模型，动辄数亿参数和海量数据，难以部署于资源受限设备。本文质疑：针对点目标导航这一单一任务，是否真需如此规模？其核心问题是，能否通过引入显式结构（如几何、占据图）来大幅降低学习负担，同时保持高性能。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型输入为RGB图像与深度图，输出为导航轨迹。系统由三个小规模神经模块构成：出口预测器将全局目标映射为当前视野内的局部像素目标；导航预测器基于鸟瞰图占据地图估计通往该目标的可行区域概率场；扩散生成器则据此采样轨迹形状。评估在InternRobotics基准的6060个点目标任务中进行，使用成功率（SR）和路径加权成功率（SPL）作为指标。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出一种结构化分解架构，在仅0.58M可训练参数下接近SOTA性能，参数量仅为NavDP的1/233。其优势不仅在于效率，还体现在更低的碰撞率、更强的传感器噪声鲁棒性，以及向无目标探索任务的迁移能力。结果表明，显式引入几何与空间推理结构可极大减少对数据与参数规模的依赖。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法的关键在于将导航任务分解为具有明确几何接口的子任务：利用解析方法计算投影、占据图与坐标变换，使神经网络专注于学习高层策略而非重复建模底层物理规律。出口预测与导航场估计分别在图像与鸟瞰图空间独立训练，扩散生成器则以残差方式生成B样条轨迹。这种解耦设计降低了学习难度，并增强了透明性与可修正性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型局限于单层平面导航，因依赖深度生成的二维鸟瞰图，无法处理多楼层场景。仿真验证未涵盖现实世界挑战如定位漂移或控制延迟。尽管如此，其系统设计极具启发性——最值得阅读的是其模块化解耦思路与接口定义，展示了如何用少量参数实现高效、安全且可解释的具身导航，对实际机器人部署具有重要意义。

papers.title: NeuralActuator: Neural Actuation Modeling for Robot Dynamics and External Force Perception
papers.titleZh: NeuralActuator: 用于机器人动力学与外部力感知的神经驱动建模
papers.abstract: Differentiable simulators have advanced policy learning and model-based control, yet actuator dynamics remain an important source of sim-to-real error. This is particularly acute on low-cost platforms, where the linear current-to-torque relation $τ= K_tI$ becomes unreliable during commanded-target tracking because of friction, hysteresis, backlash, and thermal effects. We present NeuralActuator, a neural actuator model that jointly predicts (i) a simulator-equivalent generalized-effort surrogate for trajectory propagation on low-cost servo platforms, (ii) external force with a contact-probability gate for sensorless force perception, and (iii) a motor-condition score for the supervised joint. We also introduce the Neural Actuation Dataset (NAD), collected with a twin-arm teleoperation system that records robot states and actuator telemetry together with external-force labels. The torque-surrogate head is trained through differentiable simulation from pose trajectories without direct generalized-effort labels, while the force, gate, and motor-condition heads receive direct supervision. A Transformer captures temporal dependencies while supporting real-time inference. We evaluate NeuralActuator on a 5-DoF OpenManipulator-X, a 6-DoF SO-101, and a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda, spanning three actuator families and platforms costing approximately USD 500 to over USD 30,000. The low-cost platforms support dynamics and force evaluation, while the offline Franka experiment provides an additional payload-force-estimation benchmark. Experiments further demonstrate its application for motor condition estimation on OpenManipulator-X and improved behavior-cloning performance when NeuralActuator is used as a pretrained module.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统机器人控制依赖电流到关节力矩的线性假设，在低成本伺服平台上因摩擦、回差和热漂移等因素失效，导致仿真到现实迁移困难。现有方法需高精度扭矩传感器或难以标定的物理模型，限制了在低资源平台上的力感知能力。本文针对此瓶颈，探索如何在无专用力传感器条件下实现精确的动力学建模与接触力估计。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文提出NeuralActuator，通过双臂遥操作采集包含状态、电机信号和外部力标签的数据集NAD。模型以命令、状态及电机遥测序列为输入，输出模拟器等效的广义力替代信号、外部力估计、接触概率门和电机状态评分。训练时利用可微分仿真反向传播位姿误差来监督力替代头，其余头使用直接标签监督。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 核心贡献在于无需直接力矩标签即可训练出高保真驱动模型，并同时支持外部力感知与异常检测。实验显示其在多个机器人平台上实现了低轨迹误差与高精度力估计，显著优于基于线性映射的传统基线。结合预训练模块的行为克隆策略提升了任务成功率，验证了该模型作为通用感知组件的价值。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法采用Transformer架构捕捉时间依赖性和关节耦合效应，通过历史序列建模非线性动态。关键创新是用位姿轨迹间接监督力替代头，绕开不可靠的电流-力矩标定。多任务设计使模型共享特征表示，提升泛化性。梯度通过可微仿真回传，形成闭环学习机制，增强了对真实动态的逼近能力。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 局限在于模型依赖实时电机遥测输入，无法预测未执行动作下的响应，且长程推理会累积误差。力估计仅输出末端合力，不支持分布式或多点接触定位。最值得阅读的是其问题设定与系统设计，展示了如何融合遥测、仿真与学习构建实用的低成本机器人感知方案。
